description_long: This is a hardcover book with a glossy dust jacket featuring a vibrant aerial photograph of a formal garden landscape on the front cover. The cover image shows lush green lawns, winding paths, and a large estate surrounded by trees, giving a sense of grandeur and order. The spine is a solid green with white and gold text, and the back cover displays a stylized maze pattern in various shades of green. The book is partially open, revealing white pages with some visible text and images inside. The edges of the dust jacket are slightly worn, and the book sits on a wooden surface. The overall appearance suggests a coffee table book focused on gardens or landscapes.
description: A hardcover book with a glossy dust jacket, featuring an aerial photograph of a grand garden on the front and a green maze pattern on the back. The spine is green with white and gold text, and the book is partially open, revealing white pages inside.
description_view_0: The back cover is visible, displaying a green maze pattern and the green spine with white and gold text.
description_view_1: The front cover is shown, featuring an aerial photograph of a formal garden landscape with lush greenery and a large estate.
description_view_2: The book is partially open, revealing the white pages and some interior content, with the back cover and spine also visible.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from an angle showing the open pages, the inside of the dust jacket, and a partial view of the front cover image.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a high-resolution aerial photograph of a formal garden with intricate landscaping, lush green lawns, winding paths, and a large estate building. The image is vibrant and detailed, capturing the symmetry and beauty of the garden from above.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is green with vertically oriented white text and a gold decorative element at the bottom. The design is simple and elegant, matching the garden theme of the cover.
